name: Wehani Rice and Mango Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 ripe mangoes, peeled, seeded and diced
salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over high heat, bring rice and water to a boil.
2. Lower the heat, cover, and cook gently for about 40 minutes or until the rice has absorbed the liquid.
3. Drain and transfer the rice to a shallow bowl; cool to room temperature.
4. When cooled, combine with citrus dressing and season with salt and pepper.
5. Right before serving, toss salad with mangoes and watercress leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
Citrus Dressing:
1. Process all ingredients in a blender or food processor until smooth.
2. Store covered in the refrigerator for up to 1 week. Yield: about 3/4 cup
